# cuVS Reference

This directory contains reference documentation for the cuVS Python API modules: CAGRA nearest-neighbor index, pairwise distance utilities, and k-means clustering.

Read the module reference files:

- [nn_cagra.md](nn_cagra.md)
- [distance.md](distance.md)
- [cluster_kmeans.md](cluster_kmeans.md)
